text: Yep 13 and fainting I remeber very well. Being told to get a grip and take an admit powder !! All the time it was endeometriosis and properly diagnosed at age 22 but by that time it was in the bowel. Never think it’s normal always get a doctors opinion. But on saying that the first GP I saw put me on the pill to resolve the situation and again it only masked what was going on.
